name: Black Bean Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the black beans with diced red and green peppers.
2. Add cooked corn kernels to the mixture.
3. Include additional diced jalapenos for extra heat.
4. Stir in cumin, coriander, and chile powder (about 1 teaspoon of each).
5. Finely chop cilantro and add it to the salsa.
6. Mix all ingredients thoroughly and refrigerate until ready to serve.
